AliExpress Digital Service Act Risk Assessment and Mitigation Report
====================================================================

Launched in 2010, AliExpress is a business-to-consumer (B2C) e-commerce platform enabling global consumers to buy directly from manufacturers and distributors in China and around the world. As our community continues to grow, we remain committed to scaling our trust and safety efforts to continue empowering customers,

The Risk Assessment and Mitigation Report, available here, has been prepared in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2022/2065 (the "DSA") following Aliexpress' designation by the European Commission as a Very Large Online Platform (VLOP) on April 25, 2023. The report provides a comprehensive summary and evaluation of five key risk modules: Prohibited and Restricted Products, Intellectual Property Rights (IPR), Consumer Protection, Content Compliance, and Data Protection, along with a detailed analysis of the corresponding mitigation measures.

2025.12

2024.12

In accordance with the DSA, AliExpress is committed to enhancing the integrity of our marketplace and strengthening our risk mitigation efforts. For a comprehensive overview of our risk assessment and mitigation initiatives, please refer to our full report here.
